    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryLat], [o].[DeliveryLng], [o].[DriverId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PickedUpAt], [o].[PickupAddress], [o].[PickupLat], [o].[PickupLng], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[CustomerId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [t].[DriverId] = [u0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [t].[Id] = [o0].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id], [u0].[Id]

INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [d].[UserId] = [u].[Id]

    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryLat], [o].[DeliveryLng], [o].[DriverId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PickedUpAt], [o].[PickupAddress], [o].[PickupLat], [o].[PickupLng], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]

    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryLat], [o].[DeliveryLng], [o].[DriverId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PickedUpAt], [o].[PickupAddress], [o].[PickupLat], [o].[PickupLng], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]

    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryLat], [o].[DeliveryLng], [o].[DriverId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PickedUpAt], [o].[PickupAddress], [o].[PickupLat], [o].[PickupLng], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]

    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryLat], [o].[DeliveryLng], [o].[DriverId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PickedUpAt], [o].[PickupAddress], [o].[PickupLat], [o].[PickupLng], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
    FROM [Orders] AS [o]
    ORDER BY [o].[CreatedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [t].[CustomerId] = [u].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [t].[DriverId] = [u0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [OrderItems] AS [o0] ON [t].[Id] = [o0].[OrderId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAt] DESC, [t].[Id], [u].[Id], [u0].[Id]

    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[CreatedAt], [o].[CustomerId], [o].[DeliveredAt], [o].[DeliveryAddress], [o].[DeliveryLat], [o].[DeliveryLng], [o].[DriverId], [o].[Notes], [o].[OrderNumber], [o].[PickedUpAt], [o].[PickupAddress], [o].[PickupLat], [o].[PickupLng], [o].[Status], [o].[TotalAmount], [o].[UpdatedAt]
